user.title: Connect to ThreadLens Core
user.description: Enter the ThreadLens Core API URL. HTTP is fine for LAN installs and the native companion panel. Use HTTPS when you have a trusted reverse proxy or TLS endpoint and want the full dashboard embedded in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ThreadLens Core
error.invalid_response: ThreadLens Core returned an invalid response
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL with scheme and host (for example http://192.168.100.4:8128)

init.title: ThreadLens options
init.description: Update the Core URL, SSL verification, and sidebar panel.

api_disconnected.title: ThreadLens Core API unreachable
api_disconnected.description: Home Assistant cannot reach ThreadLens Core at {url}. Confirm Core is running, the URL is correct, and the host can reach Core on your LAN.
